feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SD Pricelist (TA: V_NLN) - Layout
entry.content:
Hello,

in the SD pricelist report (TA: V_NLN) there are two badis which are called:

- BADI_PIQ_SDPRICELIST

- BADI_PIQ_SDPRICELIST_OUTPUT

with a couple of methods to change the processing/result of the report.

1.) Is there a way to adjust the ALV layout, e.g. have the option for 'Optimized Width' or 'Zebra' pattern active (w/o modification)?

2.) Is there a way to tell the system to download an excel file with extension of .xlsx instead of the old extension .xls

Thanks for you answers and ideas,

bapimueller/Thomas

entry.title: Getting error while extending additional sales area in BP Customer - Acct Assmt Grp Cust
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have created new customer and extended to one sales area and successfully saved. But later we are not able to extend this customer to additional sales area and its erroring out at Customer -> Billing -> Accounting -> Acct assmt Grp Cust. 

Error - Acct Assmt Grp Cust. ( KNVV-KTGRD) is a required entry field

Initially we provided and its accepted but if we try to extend to additional sales area within the same sales Org its not accepting that value and keep asking and unable to save.

We are able to create customer only for 1 sales area and not able to extend further.

Need gaudance to fix the issue. Please advise.

entry.title: VA01 missing text on popup
entry.content:
Dear gurus,

when running transaction va01 and creating standard order I've encountered a popup box with blank element, do we have a related sap note for this?

Your help will be greatly appreciated!

Kind regards,

Dom

entry.title: Error MLCCS 202 in VFX3
entry.content:
Hello!

Has anyone experienced this MLCCS 202 error in the VFX3 transaction? What alternative is there to solve it?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Bundling Sales Items together for a special price
entry.content:
I am struggling to create a BOM that allows me to load Sales of items bundled together for a special.

If I setup a BOM with the child items and load into a Quote, I want the child items all to show up as parts of the BOM on the quote but with no pricing displayed. The Bundle part code should reflect the price for the items in the bundle.

The issue for me is the above setup can be done using both a Sales BOM and a Template BOM however the  GP values are all wrong behind the scenes. We currently run a Template BOM, and have Item codes from various Item Groups making up the bundle. The GP on the child item codes comes through as a negative on all the items as there is no Sales numbers associated to these line items(only the parent Item Code), but the main Bundle Item code gets a GP number of 100% since there is no cost associated to that item code.

I need this system to allocate an amound of the total Bundle Sale to each line item in the BOM so we can measure the GP for each product.

I have a workaround about to be implemented, whereby I load a BOM with no Price, the child items load into the system with a sales price. Our Team then manipulates the price manually according to the split of the Sale number we want against each line item, we then add a Sub Total line below the Special to give it a Value.

We then have a user defined field in place to hide the Values of the Child items on the Crystal report Template so that when we print a Quote/SO or INV we don't see the individual prices of the line items, just a bundle price for all the products in the Special on teh Sub Total line.

If there is a better way of handling this so SAP automatically loads the line items without our team needing to think... then please send any suggestions. 

Remember, I need to see the GP of each item correctly so when I run reports, we can see how much money we making per item.

Regards

Roger

entry.title: SAP SD VOFM Pricing Requirement routine not working correctly
entry.content:
Hi All, 

I have a reqiurement to set one Price Calculation Condition at the Position level active on the basis of currency. i.e. If the Currency in the sales order header is same as the Condition type currency only then this condition type should be displayed in pricing else not.

I have created a new Pricing Requirement routine, the logic in this routine is working fine but still the condition is being displayed always. 

In the Pricing Analysis, I can see that the Condition type is first set as not considered and then again its being found.

Any help why is it behaving like this or How to achive this Requirement

BR, 

Ketan

entry.title: Workflow for sale order is completed but status is CN instead of CO
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

we have workflow with 4 level approver

1 from MDM team

2 costing team

3 production and planning team

4 business head

workflow is approved from all levels but changes doesn’t reflect 

workflow is triggered to change the procurement status of sales order from CN to CP

 

 

please help

entry.title: Work flow description is empty
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We have a workflow for maintaining the price condition record, VK11 in some cases the condition record is visible in VK13 in blocked state but the work flow description is empty if i re assign the condition record in vk11 it will show the description in workflow 

No authorization check in SU53

entry.title: Configuration run in sales order
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is there is any confirguration/development related to the confirmation run and costing run in sales order.

my users don’t have access to va02 there fore i want to do development related to the configuration run, some times user forgot to take configuration run.

background job for configuration run or any sap standard configuration which through error if configuration or costing run is not taken.

thanks

entry.title: Pricing Badi for On Prem S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi All,

There are Badi's to create routines for Pricing in S/4 HANA Cloud Version.

Link Below:2756560 - Cloud BAdIs for pricing | SAP Knowledge Base Article

Is there something similar for On Prem Version?

Thanks,

Priya

entry.title: Implementing Multiple Risk Classes for Business Partner Credit Management in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Our company's credit management process requires the ability to assign different risk classes to the same customer based on the credit segment they are associated with. Is there a way or a recommended approach in S/4HANA to achieve this requirement? We need to maintain distinct credit limits and credit control parameters for each credit segment independently for the same customer.
Any insights, best practices, or configuration tips would be greatly appreciated.
Regards,

entry.title: OPD: Sending an E-Mail to the creator of a sales order, when all items are fully confirmed
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We are using OPD and are trying to implement a specific email dispatch scenario. A sales representative wants an email to be sent to the creator of a sales order whenever all items in the order are confirmed. Is this possible with OPD? If so, how can it be achieved? If not, what alternative approaches would you recommend?

Kind regards,
Tim

entry.title: How to determine the correct tax id per each customer based on country
entry.content:
Hi All,

Based on OSS Note https://me.sap.com/notes/0002818042/en , the customer tax ID in S4 hana will be maped to each KNA1-STCD* field based on the last number of the tax ID or for some countries with other logic (Argentina, Germany, etc).

I am creating a development where I need to show the tax id number per each customer in the same field, so I need to be able to determine which STCD* will be used per each country,

Someone know how to determine the correct tax id per each country? 

I cant found a function or program to do that.

Regards,

Ale.

entry.title: Replicate stock level from S4HANA onpremise to external system
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have a requirement to replicate the stock level from the S4HANA system to an external system a few times a day. I found instructions to configure IDOC COD_STOCK_REPLICATE in a few places but not sure how to trigger this IDOC. I understand there is a specific program RCOD_STOCK_EXTRACT for C4C. Can someone please help me with this?

Kind Regards

Shantha

#stockreplication

entry.title: Cannot post document: tax base in local currency is zero Message no. FF759
entry.content:
Hello All,

I hope you all are well, when I was releasing my commercial invoice from code VF02 to create accounting entries I got the above error after checking OBYZ I was unable to find the actual reason for that error.

Please help me out. I would appreciate your expertise.

entry.title: Wrong posting date for sequential order
entry.content:
Hello dear Experts,

Client needs the ability to create billing with a backdated date, for example: today is 24.07 and the client wants to create billing with billing date of 18.07. In their system, when I try to release document for accounting that meets the requirements, the fallowing message appears " Wrong posting date for sequential order (Header Phase 001)". Do you have anny ideas how I can reslove this problem?

Thanks in advance experts.

entry.title: How to identify for JOUG condition type in Pric.Proc.
entry.content:
Hello Experts ,

requirement is system should validate for GST conditions ( JOIG,JOCG,JOSG,JOUG) in pricing procedure .so i have applied one routine in pricing procedure based on logic - that system should validate for Plant's region (REGIO)and ship to Party 'region (REGIO)  and given logic for JOIG,JOCG& JOSG but how can i do the same for JOUG as for union territories state region are in same table where all sates code maintained

entry.title: Report with Net Prices for Open Deliveries
entry.content:
Hello community , 

i want to see the Values of Net Prices from my Open Deliveries .

How can i get this Report ?

In Transaction #VL06 i did not get the Net Value.....

entry.title: Best way to default values in filter bar
entry.content:
We have a simple requirement: default filter-bar fields in a bunch of standard tiles, for all users in a department.

For example in the Sales Order Overview F2200, the currency should default to CAD, and sales org default to XXX, etc.

There are many options that seem to be overwriting each other, we just need to know what the best approach is. Things we have tried so far:

1. Create a public default Variant in key-user Adapt UI, put it in a transport and move it to prod. This doesn't set all default values, example the currency still shows up as EUR.

2. Configure User Defaults in settings. Because you can't transport user defaults, we'd have to ask 3000 users to go into Settings and manually do this.

3. The Sales tiles have parameters like &&User.Default&&currency. We can create new Z tiles and set those default parameters to certain values. This however did not work, as the currency still goes back to EUR no matter what the value passed in the parameter.

So the question again is what is the best way to set default values to filter bars for our users? (ie. we're not talking personalization, we need to do this in customization for users)

____

(ps. we've already looked at many blogs, such as this, this, this but as mentioned some values still don't get defaulted for all users, like currency).

entry.title: Alt Condition base value
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I have requirement where I need to calculate condition value on 2 different parameters, like If a customer is retailer i need to calculate condition value on Gross price and if the customer is Distributor then calculate on Net price.

I hope this can be achieved through a formula routine in Alt Condition base value.

If KUNNR = R then KWERT = KZWI1 grossprice else KWERT = KZWI2.

Need your expert advise.
